title: mespilus pyracanthifolia
intro: Mespilus pyracanthifolia, also known as the thornapple or pyracantha amur, is a plant species in the family Rosaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and acting as an expectorant. Mespilus pyracanthifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal and health benefits.
